Test Article Title

This is a substantial test article with enough content to be detected by Readability. It contains multiple paragraphs of meaningful text that simulate a real blog post or news article. The content extraction module should be able to identify this as the main content area.

Second paragraph with more detail. This article discusses testing strategies for content extraction in Chrome extensions. We need enough text here to pass the minimum content threshold that Readability uses to determine if something is worth extracting.

Third paragraph continues the discussion. Content extraction is a critical feature for any web-to-markdown conversion tool. The quality of the extraction directly impacts the usefulness of the final markdown output for LLM consumption.

Fourth paragraph adds even more content to ensure Readability has enough to work with. Articles typically have several paragraphs, and our extractor needs to handle all of them correctly while maintaining the document structure.

Fifth paragraph wraps up the article. In conclusion, thorough testing of content extraction ensures reliable conversion across a wide variety of web pages and content types.
